title: ICE Chaos in Minneapolis, Clawdbot Takeover, Why the Dollar is Dropping
description:
(0:00) Bestie intros + quick Davos recap

(9:55) ICE chaos in Minneapolis: aftermath and reactions to the two recent deaths

(45:54) Clawdbot takeover: Jason demos his OpenClawd instances, Kimi K2.5, entering the next phase of AI

(1:09:58) De-dollarization, gold and silver ripping

(1:20:05) California governor race

analysis.summary: The All-In Podcast discusses the ICE chaos in Minneapolis, the Clawdbot takeover, and the de-dollarization trend. They also touch on the California governor race and the recent deaths in Minneapolis. The hosts share their insights on the current state of AI, gold and silver prices, and the potential implications of these trends.

takeaways.text: ICE chaos in Minneapolis leads to deaths and protests
Clawdbot takeover marks the next phase of AI

sentiment.notes: The hosts express concern over the current trends and their potential implications. They discuss the need for caution and careful consideration in the face of these developments.

notable_moments.description: Discussion of ICE chaos in Minneapolis
De-dollarization trend and gold and silver prices discussed
